name: map
description: Dictionary/map utilities mirroring Python's dict methods

new.description: Create an empty map, or from alternating key value args

set.description: Return a new map with key set to value

default.description: Value to return if key is missing

del.description: Return a new map with key removed

has.description: Return true if map contains key

keys.description: Return a list of all keys

values.description: Return a list of all values

items.description: Return a list of [key, value] pairs

merge.description: Merge two maps (right wins on conflict)

pop.description: Return the value for key and return a new map without it

select.description: Return a sub-map containing only the listed keys

omit.description: Return a map excluding the listed keys

from_pairs.description: Create a map from a list of [key, value] pairs

from_lists.description: Create a map from a keys list and a values list

update.description: Alias for map:set — set key to value in place (mutates var)

contains_value.description: Return true if value exists anywhere in the map

json.description: Serialize map to a JSON string

from_json.description: Parse a JSON string into a map
